marketing.tagline: You used to just show up.
marketing.problemBody: You follow each other's lives on a screen. You just don't end up in the same room anymore.
marketing.howHeadline: It works the way people actually work.
marketing.howSubline: At home, at the park, a basketball court — wherever you happen to be.
marketing.step1Desc: One tap says you're around — right now, or at a time you pick. Your friends get notified.
marketing.step2Desc: When a friend opens their door, you'll see it. No asking. No planning required.
marketing.step3Desc: One tap. They'll know you're interested. The rest of the conversation happens wherever it usually does.
marketing.socialCaption: Real people, real time, no ceremony.
marketing.bottomHeadline: Put your phone down for the right reason.

landing.subtagline: Open your door whenever you're free — spontaneously or planned — and let the right friends know.
landing.step1Desc: Just a tap to open now, or schedule a time. Friends get notified automatically.
landing.step2Desc: When a friend's door is open, you'll see it. Drop by whenever.
landing.step3Desc: One tap and they know you're on your way.

auth.verifyEmailSent: Check your email to verify your account before logging in.
auth.verificationResent: Verification email resent. Check your inbox.
auth.couldNotResend: Could not resend. Please try again.
auth.emailVerified: Email verified! You can now log in.
auth.verificationInvalid: Verification link is invalid or expired.
auth.linkExpiredDesc: This verification link has already been used or has expired.
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetLinkSent: Check your email. If that address is registered, a reset link is on its way.
auth.resetLinkExpired: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

common.appBannerText: Get the dropby app to be notified when friends open the door, or when they RSVP.

home.openDoorDesc: Visible to your selected friends. Closes after 30 minutes, or whenever you decide.
home.inviteFriendsText: Want to see your friends more? Add them to your dropby.
home.muteFriendsHint: You can mute friends to hide them here.
home.doorDurationClosePreview: Your door stops showing at {{time}} (in {{minutes}} min)
home.doorDurationExplainer: Guests don't see a closing time — this just controls when your door disappears for your friends.
home.yourDoorIsOpen: Your door is open — tap to return
home.feedbackTipText: Enjoying dropby? Your feedback shapes what we build next.
home.feedbackTipDismissed: You can always share feedback from your
home.coffeeTipText: Someone dropped by. If we brought you a real moment, consider buying us a coffee ☕
home.doorOpenCopyText: I opened my door for you on dropby
home.rsvpNoteHint: This is a one-way note, not a chat.
home.updateCalendar: Session changed — re-download the .ics to sync your calendar
home.notifOpenTitle: Get notified when a friend says they're on their way?
home.notifGoingTitle: Get notified if there are updates?
home.notifDesc: dropby will let you know when something happens.

friends.title: Friends
friends.noFriendsDesc: Invite people or add them by email.
friends.removeMessage: Remove {{name}} as a friend? This cannot be undone.

invite.ownLinkDesc: Share it with friends to let them join dropby.
invite.friendsNowDesc: You and {{name}} are now friends on dropby.
invite.signUpToJoin: Sign up / Log in to fully join dropby
invite.sendMeAppLink: Send me a link to the app
invite.weNotifiedThem: We sent {{name}} a notification that you're on your way.
invite.noteDisclaimer: {{name}} will be notified, but may not see this right away. Reach out separately if you need to coordinate.

feedback.title: Share feedback
feedback.thanksDesc: Your feedback goes straight to the people building dropby. It matters.
feedback.thoughtPlaceholder: Is dropby helping you make plans with people? What's working, what isn't?
feedback.bugPlaceholder: What happened? What were you trying to do?
feedback.wantsReply: You can reach me for follow-up

profile.title: Profile
profile.tipsReset: Tips reset — they'll show up again on the home screen
profile.remindersDesc: We'll send you a notification to open your door.
profile.autoNudgeTitle: Remind me based on previous times
profile.deleteMessage: This will permanently delete your account, friends, and all data. This cannot be undone.
